subject: docs: update all docs for PWA hook changes per CLAUDE.md requirements
body:
USER_GUIDE.md:
- Add Opera, Samsung Internet, Vivaldi, Arc to browser support table
- Add Samsung Internet and Opera install instructions
- Group Vivaldi/Arc with Chrome/Edge/Brave in automatic install section
- Add iOS non-Safari cross-redirect note explaining Safari requirement
- Update Updates section to mention visibility-based checking

TESTING_GUIDE.md:
- Add 4 PWA test scenarios: update banner on tab refocus, install prompt
  on Chromium, manual install instructions on Safari/Firefox, iOS
  non-Safari cross-redirect
- Add PWA regression checklist items

TODO.md:
- Add usePWAUpdate.js and usePWAInstall.js to untested modules list
  with notes on what needs mocking (SW registration, beforeinstallprompt)

CLAUDE.md:
- Add AI note for PWA module-level singleton pattern and CHROMIUM_BROWSERS
- Add AI note for iOS browser detection (CriOS/FxiOS/EdgiOS)

Tags: docs, pwa, testing
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pwa-reliability
Semver: patch

https://claude.ai/code/session_01AC1UWyZGqVwHGuu6SPJr72
title: update all docs for PWA hook changes per CLAUDE.md requirements
